---
title: "rig proj"
---

<!-- Generated by website/gen-cli-reference.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

## `rig proj`

```text
TODO

Usage: rig proj [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

Commands:
  deploy  Deploy project dependencies
  deps    Show project dependencies
  solve   Solve project dependencies
  help    Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
      --json
          JSON output

      --user
          Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)

      --admin
          Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)

  -h, --help
          Print help (see a summary with '-h')
```

### `rig proj deploy`

```text
Deploy project dependencies

Usage: rig proj deploy [OPTIONS] --library <library>

Options:
  -l, --library <library>
          Library path where packages should be installed
      --r-binary <r-binary>
          Path to R binary (default: R)
      --max-concurrent <max-concurrent>
          Maximum number of concurrent installations (default: 4)
      --user
          Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin
          Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help
          Print help
```

### `rig proj deps`

```text
Show project dependencies

Usage: rig proj deps [OPTIONS]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>  Project file to solve (e.g. DESCRIPTION)
      --json           JSON output
      --dev            Include dev (development) dependencies
      --user           Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin          Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help           Print help
```

### `rig proj solve`

```text
Solve project dependencies

Usage: rig proj solve [OPTIONS]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>          Project file to solve (e.g. DESCRIPTION)
      --renv                   Output and renv.lock file
      --json                   JSON output
  -r, --r-version <r-version>  R version to solve dependencies for
      --dev                    Include dev (development) dependencies
      --user                   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin                  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help                   Print help
```
